dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates explicit governance integration through the rules-context-loader and alignment-engine spans. Both steps completed with schema_validation_success, indicating the agent successfully incorporated and validated architectural rules.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map span shows significant reasoning depth, evidenced by the generation of 65,072 completion tokens. This suggests a comprehensive mapping of work items to architectural evolution states.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine and architecture-intent-generator spans effectively synthesized the evolution map into a final intent. The successful schema validation across these steps indicates that architectural trade-offs were resolved into a structured output.
